# JSStringIsEqual(_:_:)

**Function**

Tests whether two JavaScript strings match.

## Declaration

```swift
func JSStringIsEqual(_ a: JSStringRef!, _ b: JSStringRef!) -> Bool
```

## Parameters

- **a**: The first [doc://com.apple.javascriptcore/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSStringRef] to test.
- **b**: The second [doc://com.apple.javascriptcore/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSStringRef] to test.

## Return Value

[doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if the two strings match; otherwise, [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false].

## Comparing JavaScript Strings

- **JSStringIsEqualToUTF8CString(_:_:)**: Tests whether a JavaScript string matches a null-terminated UTF-8 string.
